nodes.label: Background translation daemon thread
nodes.rationale: Translation jobs run in background daemon threads in services/runner.py and return immediately - never block the browser while translating.

nodes.label: HTMX 5s polling for chapters and stats
nodes.rationale: Novel detail chapter table and stats poll every 5s via HTMX while Chapter.status is active. Chapter reader auto-reloads every 5s while translating.
nodes.norm_label: htmx 5s polling for chapters and stats

nodes.label: Chunk-parallel translation via ThreadPoolExecutor
nodes.rationale: Raw text splits by paragraph, punctuation, then characters (TRANSLATION_MAX_CHUNK_CHARS=5000). Chunks translated in parallel by ThreadPoolExecutor; results joined by original index.

nodes.label: Automatic glossary extraction post-translation
nodes.rationale: After translating a chapter, an extra LLM call extracts new glossary terms if AUTO_EXTRACT_GLOSSARY=true. Exceptions during extraction are silently swallowed.

nodes.label: 5-summary context window for next chapter
nodes.rationale: Up to 5 most recent ChapterSummary rows selected by creation ID are passed as context when translating the next chapter, preserving narrative continuity.

nodes.label: Three-view reader (raw/vi/both)
nodes.rationale: GET /chapters/{id}?view=raw|vi|both with default vi. Server-rendered tabs, parallel two-column on desktop for view=both.

nodes.label: DB ProviderSetting overrides .env fallback
nodes.rationale: A ProviderSetting DB row overrides .env configuration for that provider; clearing the row reverts to env fallback.

nodes.label: In-memory thread registry (tech debt: no resume after restart)
nodes.rationale: Background translation jobs tracked only in in-memory dict in services/runner.py. App restart loses registry; jobs stuck in 'translating' status.
nodes.norm_label: in-memory thread registry (tech debt: no resume after restart)
